    intro x hx y hy hxy
    exact cos_le_cos_of_nonneg_of_le_pi (by linarith [hx.1, hx.2]) (by linarith [hy.1, hy.2]) hxy
  have h₅ : cos '' Set.Icc 0 π = Set.Icc (-1) 1 := by
    ext y
    simp [Set.mem_Icc, cos_mem_Icc]
    constructor
    · intro ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
      exact ⟨by linarith [hx.1, hx.2], by linarith [hx.1, hx.2]⟩
    · intro ⟨hy₁, hy₂⟩
      use arccos y
      constructor
      · exact ⟨by linarith [arccos_le_pi y], by linarith [zero_le_arccos y]⟩
      · simp [cos_arccos hy₁ hy₂]
  rw [← integral_comp_mul_deriv' (f := f) (g := cos) (a := 0) (b := π)]

  all_goals
